districts.name: Censor Gate
districts.summary: Inspection queues braid through white arches while charter lamps search carts for metaphor.
districts.featureDescription: Its lenses compare each passerby against a person the state would find easier.

districts.name: Inner Court
districts.summary: Petitions, precedents, and palace traffic circle the calm center of imperial power.
districts.featureDescription: Licensed water repeats the shape of every ruling made within earshot.

districts.name: Archive Quarter
districts.summary: File bridges join sealed offices above alleys where copyists sell yesterday's official truth.
districts.featureDescription: Brass feet let this cabinet follow the office currently responsible for it.

landmarks.name: the withdrawn monument
landmarks.description: An empty plinth commemorates a victory removed so thoroughly that pigeons avoid remembering it.
